Think defensive masterclasses are a modern invention?

Think again. Arrigo Sacchi's AC Milan pioneered the modern defensive high line and zonal pressing in the late 80s! Their offside trap wasn't just a tactic; it was an art form. Teams were terrified to even cross the halfway line. Changed football forever. GENIUS. #Milan #Sacchi #Tactics #FootballHistory

Only ONE has truly broken the ceiling. George Weah in '95? UNPLAYABLE. The man single-handedly ran through entire teams, bagged the Ballon d'Or, and solidified his place as an African King in Europe. A force of nature. #Weah #AfricanFootball #BallondOr
